text:
money, object or record accepted as payment, also known as simoleon, moolah, dough, cash, monies. Attributes include: 
- subclass of: "legal tender",
 "standard of deferred payment"
- Commons category: "Money"
- Commons gallery: "Money"
- different from: "currency"
- described by source: "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary",
 "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary",
 "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary",
 "The Nuttall Encyclopædia (subject named as: Money)",
 "Encyclopædia Britannica 11th edition",
 "New International Encyclopedia",
 "Pauly–Wissowa"
- main Wikidata property: "cash"
- on focus list of Wikimedia project: "Wikipedia:List of articles all languages should have"
- has use: "payment",
 "trade"
- history of topic: "history of money"
- instance of: "legal fiction",
 "medium of exchange"
- named after: "groschen (language of work or name: Ukrainian)"
